zh.Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Hutchinson於1460年1月1日出生在英國越可爾考拉姆時，她的父親William Hutchinson Esq.34歲，母親Anne Bennett29歲。她於1483年與William English在英國越可爾考拉姆結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年1月1日在英國爾斯托普特享年37歲。

zh-hans.Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Hutchinson于1460年1月1日出生在英国越可爾考拉姆时，她的父亲William Hutchinson Esq.34岁，母亲Anne Bennett29岁。她于1483年与William English在英国越可爾考拉姆结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1497年1月1日在英国爾斯托普特享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Old French personal name Hucheon (see Houchin ) + -son.
Irish: in Ireland and Scotland, adopted for Mac Uisdein and Mac Uistin; see McCutcheon .

History: Anne Marbury Hutchinson (1591–1643) and her husband William came from Lincolnshire, England, to MA in 1634. A religious dissident, she led the first attack on the Puritans and was banished from the Massachusetts Bay Colony. She moved to RI in 1638, and, after her husband's death in 1642, settled in NY, where the Hutchinson River was named in her honor. Ironically, the Hutchinson name stayed on in MA and one of her descendants, Thomas Hutchinson (1711–80), was royal governor of Massachusetts Bay Colony.

variants.name: Houchin
meanings: English (Essex): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Huchon, a double diminutive of Hue (see Hugh ) common in Picardy, corresponding to Old French Hueçon, Huesson, modern French Husson. This was used as a personal name in Scotland, where it also became a surname and was adopted in Gaelic as Huisdean or Uisdean; see McCutcheon and compare Hutch .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Hutchinson was born on 1 January 1460, in Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, her father, William Hutchinson Esq., was 34 and her mother, Anne Bennett, was 29. She married William English in 1483, in Cowlam, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 1 January 1497, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Hutchinson est née le 1 janvier 1460, à Cowlam, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Hutchinson Esq., avait 34 ans et sa mère, Anne Bennett, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé William English en 1483, à Cowlam, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1497, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Hutchinson am 1. Januar 1460 in Cowlam, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Hutchinson Esq. 34 und ihre Mutter Anne Bennett 29. Sie hat 1483 in Cowlam, Yorkshire, England William English geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1497 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Stockport, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Hutchinson è nata il il 1 gennaio 1460 nel Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William Hutchinson Esq., aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Anne Bennett, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato William English nel 1483, nel Cowlam, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 1 gennaio 1497, nel Stockport, Cheshire, England, all'età di 37 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Hutchinson(이)가 1460년 1월 1일 영국 요르크실르 코우램에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Hutchinson Esq.(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Bennett(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1483년 영국 요르크실르 코우램에서 William English(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 1월 1일 영국 체실르 스톡포트에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William English em 1483, em Cowlam, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1497, em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Hutchinson родилась 1 января 1460 г. в местности коулэм, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Hutchinson Esq. было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Bennett, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William English в 1483 г. в местности коулэм, еркшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 января 1497 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия в возрасте 37 лет.
